calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessica Farinas for Randall Matley (Petitioner).

Ms. Farinas stated that she has both of the original 13100 affidavits to be filed, addressed the extraordinary fee request stating that two heirs died during this proceeding and they had to locate their heirs, that they negotiated the DHCS lien down from $382,000.00 to $50,000.00 which was paid out of the estate, that DHCS assessed a separate claim for about $370,000.00 with respect to a Special Needs Trust, that the allowance of the landlord's claim was served, but not filed, and that she has it with her today to file as well as the letter regarding the allowance and the payment. Ms. Farinas also stated that no heir or beneficiary is or has ever been confined in a Department of Corrections and that she has a proposed order (provided in Court). The Amended First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
